meaning: adj.无用的,不能胜任的,无益的
examples: A motor vehicle is discarded as unserviceable.
For a motor vehicle which ought to be discarded as unserviceable, it must be deregistered in good time.
The risk premium on Brazilian bonds has soared, leading some analysts to fear that the debt will become unserviceable.
She said they had originally intended to fly by RAF plane, but on Friday it had become unserviceable outside the UK, leaving them with "no other viable option" at short notice.
